name: Should I do Google Assistant optimization myself or hire someone?
description: DIY works for basic FAQs and profile cleanup. Professional help is better for technical fixes, schema, and multi-location optimization.

mainEntity.name: Should I do Google Assistant optimization myself or hire someone?

acceptedAnswer.text: If you are comparing DIY and professional help, DIY can work for small changes, but a professional is useful when you need technical schema, page-speed repairs, or multi-location cleanup. That is especially true when you are targeting several cities at once.
acceptedAnswer.description: DIY works for basic FAQs and profile cleanup. Professional help is better for technical fixes, schema, and multi-location optimization.
